phase_name: Root-cause fix - absolute, task-decoupled default manifest dir

objectives.description: Baseline: run nix flake check before editing
Edit lib.nix:35 manifestDirDefault to absolute XDG-state path
Confirm override precedence unchanged (code review only)
Rebuild wrappers: home-manager build / nix flake check
Verify built binaries resolve new absolute default; --help shows it

notes: Baseline `nix flake check` clean before edits. Edited lib.nix:35 (manifestDirDefault -> $HOME/.local/state/email-agent/manifests, literal $HOME in double-quoted Nix string interpolated into the ''...'' preamble so bash expands it at runtime), lib.nix:72-74 help text (dropped stale 'relative to cwd/.dotfiles repo root' phrasing), docs/email-workflow.md:27. Override precedence (lib.nix:61 default assign, lib.nix:85-86 flag overrides) unchanged by inspection. home-manager build --flake .#benjamin succeeded (rebuilt all 5 wrapper drvs: email-census, email-classify, email-unsubscribe-extract, email-archive-confirmed, email-delete-confirmed). Verified via realpath-resolved home-path binaries: all 5 grep to `MANIFEST_DIR="${EMAIL_MANIFEST_DIR:-$HOME/.local/state/email-agent/manifests}"`; `email-census --help` shows the resolved absolute path in its help text. Live read-only verification (sanctioned per plan: dry-run/read-only wrapper-only, no --execute, no mutation): ran `email-census --account gmail` once with EMAIL_MANIFEST_DIR=/tmp/mtest-116 override and once with --manifest-dir /tmp/mtest-116-flag override; both created mkdir -p at the overridden path (confirming override still wins over the new default) and both temp dirs + log files were removed immediately after. `nix flake check` passed cleanly after the rebuild (all checks passed!). grep -rn '072_email_workflow_infrastructure_prereqs/manifests' modules/home/email docs/ returns no stale live references (only historical/doc-history mentions of the archived task number remain, which is expected and acceptable per the plan).
